scripts.dev:backend: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path '.\\backend\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe') { Set-Location backend; .\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 } else { Write-Error 'Missing backend/.venv. Create it and install backend requirements first.'; exit 1 }"
scripts.dev:frontend: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location frontend; npm run dev"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
